name: Chicken Cacciatore

ingredients.item: can of San Marzano tomatoes plus one can of water

method: In a large frying pan on medium heat, add 1/4 cup olive oil. Add onions and saute for a couple of minutes, add chicken pieces, brown on both sides, add crushed garlic, basil, parsley, salt, pepper, oregano, tomatoes and a can of water. Simmer covered on medium-low for an hour or when the chicken is falling off the bone and tender. Prepare pasta at the end of simmering time. Remove the cooked chicken pieces and add pasta to the sauce. Add a ladle of pasta water, mix, and manticare. Place the chicken on top of the pasta or to the side. Serves 4. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Olé
